caption: A person's hands are shown holding a clear plastic protective case over a stack of cards. The cards are encased in white sleeves with yellow tops, resting on a surface featuring a logo with palm trees and an orange circle. The scene includes several on-screen overlays. A logo reading "JASPYS" is visible alongside the text "CASEBREAKS.COM". In a smaller inset window, a man with a beard and glasses wearing a navy blue t-shirt sits at a desk with a microphone, looking toward the camera. As the sequence progresses, the hands move the clear case, shifting it from the top of the card stack toward the right side of the frame. The "JASPYS" logo and the inset video of the man remain constant throughout the frames, while the perspective of the clear case changes as it is manipulated by the person's hands.
